title: 2D and 3D Medium Collision
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for images where flat handmade drawing and photoreal 3D objects share one physical scene with credible shadows, occlusion, and material boundaries.

en.title: 2D and 3D Medium Collision
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for images where flat handmade drawing and photoreal 3D objects share one physical scene with credible shadows, occlusion, and material boundaries.

zh-CN.title: 2D 手绘 × 3D 实拍碰撞
zh-CN.description: 测试二维手绘层与三维实拍物体在同一画面中共存,重点考察阴影、遮挡、材质和渲染层隔离。
